name: Bulbasaur
description: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokémon.

name: Ivysaur
description: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

name: Venusaur
description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

name: Charmander
description: Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: Charmeleon
description: When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels.

name: Charizard
description: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally.

name: Squirtle
description: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.

name: Wartortle
description: Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance.

name: Blastoise
description: A brutal Pokémon with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.

name: Caterpie
description: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

name: Metapod
description: The shell is filled with a soft liquid. It doesn't move much because it is preparing for evolution.

name: Butterfree
description: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.

name: Weedle
description: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp venomous stinger on its head.

name: Kakuna
description: Almost incapable of moving, this Pokémon can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.

name: Beedrill
description: Flies at high speed and attacks using its large venomous stingers on its forelegs and tail.

name: Pidgey
description: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

name: Pidgeotto
description: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this Pokémon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

name: Pidgeot
description: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as Magikarp.

name: Rattata
description: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.

name: Raticate
description: It uses its whiskers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.

name: Spearow
description: Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speed to stay airborne.

name: Fearow
description: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep flying without ever having to land for rest.

name: Ekans
description: Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as Pidgey and Spearow, whole.

name: Arbok
description: It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area.

name: Pikachu
description: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.

name: Raichu
description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.

name: Sandshrew
description: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.

name: Sandslash
description: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.

name: Nidoran♀
description: Although small, its venomous barbs render this Pokémon dangerous. The female has smaller horns.

name: Nidorina
description: The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as scratching and biting.

name: Nidoqueen
description: Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves.

name: Nidoran♂
description: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom.

name: Nidorino
description: An aggressive Pokémon that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.

name: Nidoking
description: It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey's bones.

name: Clefairy
description: Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.

name: Clefable
description: A timid fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Vulpix
description: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.

name: Ninetales
description: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.

name: Jigglypuff
description: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: Wigglytuff
description: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.

name: Zubat
description: Form colonies in perpetually dark places. Uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets.

name: Golbat
description: It loves the blood of living things. It is particularly active in the pitch black of night.

name: Oddish
description: During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.

name: Gloom
description: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.

name: Vileplume
description: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

name: Paras
description: Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by drawing in nutrients from the bug host.

name: Parasect
description: A host-parasite pair in which the parasite mushroom has taken over the host bug. Prefers damp places.

name: Venonat
description: Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats insects. It is attracted by light at night.

name: Venomoth
description: The dust-like scales covering its wings are color coded to indicate the kind of poison it has.

name: Diglett
description: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.

name: Dugtrio
description: A team of Diglett triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

name: Meowth
description: Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly patrol to look for dropped loose change.

name: Persian
description: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

name: Psyduck
description: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily Pokémon will use psychokinetic powers.

name: Golduck
description: Often seen swimming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa.

name: Mankey
description: Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant.

name: Primeape
description: Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught.

name: Growlithe
description: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

name: Arcanine
description: A Pokémon that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.

name: Poliwag
description: Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming than trying to stand.

name: Poliwhirl
description: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.

name: Poliwrath
description: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breaststroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.

name: Abra
description: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and teleport to safety.

name: Kadabra
description: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by.

name: Alakazam
description: Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.

name: Machop
description: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger.

name: Machoke
description: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power save belt to be able to regulate its motions.

name: Machamp
description: Using its heavy muscles, it throws powerful punches that can send the victim clear over the horizon.

name: Bellsprout
description: A carnivorous Pokémon that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture.

name: Weepinbell
description: It spits out PoisonPowder to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of Acid.

name: Victreebel
description: Said to live in huge colonies deep in the jungle, although no one has ever returned from there.

name: Tentacool
description: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stinging acid.

name: Tentacruel
description: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey.

name: Geodude
description: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.

name: Graveler
description: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.

name: Golem
description: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.

name: Ponyta
description: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.

name: Rapidash
description: Very competitive, this Pokémon will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.

name: Slowpoke
description: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.

name: Slowbro
description: The Shellder that is latched onto Slowpoke's tail is said to feed on the host's leftover scraps.

name: Magnemite
description: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses Thunder Wave and similar moves.

name: Magneton
description: Formed by three Magnemite linked together. They mysteriously float in the air.

name: Farfetch'd
description: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword.

name: Doduo
description: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.

name: Dodrio
description: Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake.

name: Seel
description: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.

name: Dewgong
description: Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.

name: Grimer
description: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

name: Muk
description: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

name: Shellder
description: Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.

name: Cloyster
description: When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen.

name: Gastly
description: Almost invisible, this gaseous Pokémon cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.

name: Haunter
description: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from another dimension.

name: Gengar
description: Under a full moon, this Pokémon likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.

name: Onix
description: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to a diamond, but colored black.

name: Drowzee
description: Puts enemies to sleep then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams.

name: Hypno
description: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of psi moves such as Hypnosis and Confusion.

name: Krabby
description: Its pincers are not just powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways.

name: Kingler
description: The large pincer has 10000 hp power. However, it is so heavy, it is difficult to aim.

name: Voltorb
description: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a Poké Ball, it has zapped many people.

name: Electrode
description: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

name: Exeggcute
description: Often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.

name: Exeggutor
description: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an Exeggcute.

name: Cubone
description: Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this Pokémon's real face.

name: Marowak
description: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.

name: Hitmonlee
description: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.

name: Hitmonchan
description: While apparently doing nothing, it fires punches in lightning fast volleys that are impossible to see.

name: Lickitung
description: Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks enemies.

name: Koffing
description: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.

name: Weezing
description: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 Koffings can fuse into a Weezing over many years.

name: Rhyhorn
description: Its massive bones are 1000 times harder than human bones. It can easily knock a trailer flying.

name: Rhydon
description: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees.

name: Chansey
description: A rare and elusive Pokémon that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it.

name: Tangela
description: The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to seaweed. Its vines shake as it walks.

name: Kangaskhan
description: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old.

name: Horsea
description: Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water.

name: Seadra
description: Capable of swimming backwards by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail.

name: Goldeen
description: Its tail fin billows like an elegant dress, giving it the nickname of the Water Queen.

name: Seaking
description: In the autumn spawning season, they can be seen swimming powerfully up rivers and creeks.

name: Staryu
description: An enigmatic Pokémon that can effortlessly regenerate any appendage it loses in battle.

name: Starmie
description: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.

name: Mr. Mime
description: If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.

name: Scyther
description: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one.

name: Jynx
description: It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

name: Electabuzz
description: Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.

name: Magmar
description: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.

name: Pinsir
description: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard.

name: Tauros
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.

name: Magikarp
description: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

name: Gyarados
description: Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage.

name: Lapras
description: A Pokémon that has been overhunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.

name: Ditto
description: It can reconstitute its entire cellular structure to change into what it sees, but it returns to normal when it relaxes.

name: Eevee
description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element stones.

name: Vaporeon
description: Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.

name: Jolteon
description: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10000-volt lightning bolts.

name: Flareon
description: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.

name: Porygon
description: A Pokémon that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

name: Omanyte
description: Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils.

name: Omastar
description: A prehistoric Pokémon that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible to catch prey.

name: Kabuto
description: A Pokémon that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.

name: Kabutops
description: Its sleek shape is perfect for swimming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.

name: Aerodactyl
description: A ferocious, prehistoric Pokémon that goes for the enemy's throat with its serrated saw-like teeth.

name: Snorlax
description: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.

name: Articuno
description: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

name: Zapdos
description: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.

name: Moltres
description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.

name: Dratini
description: Long considered a mythical Pokémon until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.

name: Dragonair
description: A mystical Pokémon that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.

name: Dragonite
description: An extremely rarely seen marine Pokémon. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.

name: Mewtwo
description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

name: Mew
description: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.

name: Chikorita
description: A sweet aroma gently wafts from the leaf on its head. It is docile and loves to soak up the sun's rays.

name: Bayleef
description: The scent of spices comes from around its neck. Somehow, sniffing it makes you want to fight.

name: Meganium
description: The aroma that rises from its petals contains a substance that calms aggressive feelings.

name: Cyndaquil
description: It is timid, and always curls itself up in a ball. If attacked, it flares up its back for protection.

name: Quilava
description: Be careful if it turns its back during battle. It means that it will attack with the fire on its back.

name: Typhlosion
description: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.

name: Totodile
description: Its well-developed jaws are powerful and capable of crushing anything. Even its trainer must be careful.

name: Croconaw
description: Once it bites down, it won't let go until it loses its fangs. New fangs quickly grow into place.

name: Feraligatr
description: When it bites with its massive and powerful jaws, it shakes its head and savagely tears its victim up.

name: Sentret
description: A very cautious Pokémon, it raises itself up using its tail to get a better view of its surroundings.

name: Furret
description: There is no telling where the tail begins. Despite its short legs, it is quick at hunting Rattata.

name: Hoothoot
description: It marks time precisely. Some countries use it as a timing aid.

name: Noctowl
description: Its eyes are specially adapted. They concentrate even faint light and enable it to see in the dark.

name: Ledyba
description: It is very timid. It will be afraid to move if it is alone. But it will be active if it is in a group.

name: Ledian
description: When the stars flicker in the night sky, it flutters about, scattering a glowing powder.

name: Spinarak
description: It spins a web using fine--but durable--thread. It then waits patiently for prey to be trapped.

name: Ariados
description: A single strand of a special string is endlessly spun out of its rear. The string leads back to its nest.

name: Crobat
description: It flies so silently through the dark on its four wings that it may not be noticed even when nearby.

name: Chinchou
description: It shoots positive and negative electricity between the tips of its two antennae and zaps its enemies.

name: Lanturn
description: The light it emits is so bright that it can illuminate the sea's surface from a depth of over three miles.

name: Pichu
description: It is not yet skilled at storing electricity. It may send out a jolt if amused or startled.

name: Cleffa
description: Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.

name: Igglybuff
description: It has a very soft body. If it starts to roll, it will bounce all over and be impossible to stop.

name: Togepi
description: A proverb claims that happiness will come to anyone who can make a sleeping Togepi stand up.

name: Togetic
description: It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.

name: Natu
description: Because its wings aren't yet fully grown, it has to hop to get around. It is always staring at something.

name: Xatu
description: They say that it stays still and quiet because it is seeing both the past and future at the same time.

name: Mareep
description: If static electricity builds in its body, its fleece doubles in volume. Touching it will shock you.

name: Flaaffy
description: As a result of storing too much electricity, it developed patches where even downy wool won't grow.

name: Ampharos
description: The tail's tip shines brightly and can be seen from far away. It acts as a beacon for lost people.

name: Bellossom
description: Plentiful in the tropics. When it dances, its petals rub together and make a pleasant ringing sound.

name: Marill
description: The tip of its tail, which contains oil that is lighter than water, lets it swim without drowning.

name: Azumarill
description: By listening with its large ears, it can identify what kind of prey is hiding, even in rough water.

name: Sudowoodo
description: Although it always pretends to be a tree, its composition appears to be closer to a rock than a plant.

name: Politoed
description: If Poliwag and Poliwhirl hear its echoing cry, they respond by gathering from far and wide.

name: Hoppip
description: To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though.

name: Skiploom
description: The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluctuates up and down.

name: Jumpluff
description: Once it catches the wind, it deftly controls its cotton-puff spores to float, even around the world.

name: Aipom
description: Its tail is so powerful that it can use it to grab a tree branch and hold itself up in the air.

name: Sunkern
description: It may drop out of the sky suddenly. If attacked by a Spearow, it will violently shake its leaves.

name: Sunflora
description: It converts sunlight into energy. In the darkness after sunset, it closes its petals and becomes still.

name: Yanma
description: If it flaps its wings really fast, it can generate shock waves that will shatter windows in the area.

name: Wooper
description: This Pokémon lives in cold water. It leaves the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.

name: Quagsire
description: This carefree Pokémon has an easy-going nature. While swimming, it always bumps into boat hulls.

name: Espeon
description: It uses the fine hair that covers its body to sense air currents and predict its enemy's actions.

name: Umbreon
description: When darkness falls, the rings on the body begin to glow, striking fear in the hearts of anyone nearby.

name: Murkrow
description: Feared and loathed by many, it is believed to bring misfortune to all those who see it at night.

name: Slowking
description: It has incredible intellect and intuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.

name: Misdreavus
description: It likes playing mischievous tricks such as screaming and wailing to startle people at night.

name: Unown
description: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tablets. It is said that the two are somehow related.

name: Wobbuffet
description: It hates light and shock. If attacked, it inflates its body to pump up its counterstrike.

name: Girafarig
description: Its tail has a small brain of its own. Beware! If you get close, it may react to your scent and bite.

name: Pineco
description: It likes to make its shell thicker by adding layers of tree bark. The additional weight doesn't bother it.

name: Forretress
description: Its entire body is shielded by a steel-hard shell. What lurks inside the armor is a total mystery.

name: Dunsparce
description: When encountered, this Pokémon flees backward by furiously boring into the ground with its tail.

name: Gligar
description: It flies straight at its target's face then clamps down on the startled victim to inject poison.

name: Steelix
description: Its body has been compressed deep under the ground. As a result, it is even harder than a diamond.

name: Snubbull
description: Although it looks frightening, it is actually kind and affectionate. It is very popular among women.

name: Granbull
description: It is actually timid and easily spooked. If attacked, it flails about to fend off its attacker.

name: Qwilfish
description: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.

name: Scizor
description: It swings its eye-patterned pincers up to scare its foes. This makes it look like it has three heads.

name: Shuckle
description: The berries it stores in its vase-like shell decompose and become a gooey liquid.

name: Heracross
description: This powerful Pokémon thrusts its prized horn under the enemies' bellies then lifts and throws them.

name: Sneasel
description: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it suddenly extends the claws and startles its enemy.

name: Teddiursa
description: If it finds honey, its crescent mark glows. It always licks its paws because they are soaked with honey.

name: Ursaring
description: Although it is a good climber, it prefers to snap trees with its forelegs and eat fallen berries.

name: Slugma
description: It never sleeps. It has to keep moving because if it stopped, its magma body would cool and harden.

name: Magcargo
description: The shell on its back is just cooled and hardened skin. It breaks easily with a slight touch.

name: Swinub
description: It rubs its snout on the ground to find and dig up food. It sometimes discovers hot springs.

name: Piloswine
description: Because the long hair all over its body obscures its sight, it just keeps charging repeatedly.

name: Corsola
description: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.

name: Remoraid
description: It has superb accuracy. The water it shoots out can strike moving prey from more than 300 feet.

name: Octillery
description: It traps enemies with its suction-cupped tentacles then smashes them with its rock-hard head.

name: Delibird
description: It carries food all day long. There are tales about lost people who were saved by the food it had.

name: Mantine
description: On sunny days, schools of Mantine can be seen elegantly leaping over the sea's waves.

name: Skarmory
description: Its sturdy wings look heavy, but they are actually hollow and light, allowing it to fly freely in the sky.

name: Houndour
description: It conveys its feelings using different cries. It works in a pack to cleverly take down prey.

name: Houndoom
description: If you are burned by the flames it shoots from its mouth, the pain will never go away.

name: Kingdra
description: It sleeps deep on the ocean floor to build its energy. It is said to cause tornadoes as it wakes.

name: Phanpy
description: It swings its long snout around to play with others. It accidentally hits them hard, but it means well.

name: Donphan
description: It has sharp, hard tusks and a rugged hide. Its Tackle is strong enough to knock down a house.

name: Porygon2
description: This upgraded version of Porygon is designed for space exploration. It can survive in a vacuum.

name: Stantler
description: The curved antlers subtly change the flow of air to create a strange space where reality is distorted.

name: Smeargle
description: A special fluid oozes from the tip of its tail. It paints the fluid everywhere to mark its territory.

name: Tyrogue
description: It is always bursting with energy. To make itself stronger, it keeps on fighting even if it loses.

name: Hitmontop
description: If you become enchanted by its smooth, elegant, dance-like kicks, you may get drilled by a hard hit.

name: Smoochum
description: Its lips are the most sensitive part of its body. It always uses its lips first to examine things.

name: Elekid
description: It rotates its arms to generate electricity. It tires easily, so it charges up only a little at a time.

name: Magby
description: Each and every time it inhales and exhales, hot embers dribble out of its mouth and nostrils.

name: Miltank
description: Its milk is packed with nutrition, making it the ultimate beverage for the sick or weary.

name: Blissey
description: Anyone who takes even one bite of Blissey's egg becomes unfailingly kind and gentle to everyone.

name: Raikou
description: The rain clouds it carries on its back let it fire thunderbolts at will. They say it descended with lightning.

name: Entei
description: Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Unable to restrain its extreme power, it races headlong around the land.

name: Suicune
description: Said to be the reincarnation of north winds, it can instantly purify filthy, muddy water.

name: Larvitar
description: A Pokémon that feeds on soil. After it has eaten a large mountain, it falls asleep so it can grow.

name: Pupitar
description: Its shell is as hard as sheet rock, and it is also very strong. Its thrashing can topple a mountain.

name: Tyranitar
description: Its body can't be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.

name: Lugia
description: It is said that it quietly spends its time deep at the bottom of the sea because its powers are too strong.

name: Ho-Oh
description: Legends say this Pokémon flies the world's skies continuously on its magnificent seven-colored wings.

name: Celebi
description: This Pokémon wanders across time. Grass and trees flourish in the forests Celebi has visited.

name: Treecko
description: It makes its home in a giant tree in the forest. It ferociously guards its territory from enemies.

name: Grovyle
description: Leaves grow out of this Pokémon's body. They help camouflage it from enemies while it is in a forest.

name: Sceptile
description: The leaves growing on its arms can cut down thick trees. It is without peer in jungle combat.

name: Torchic
description: If attacked, it strikes back by spitting balls of fire it forms in its stomach. A Torchic dislikes darkness.

name: Combusken
description: It polishes its fighting skills by running around the mountains and fields. Its legs are fast and strong.

name: Blaziken
description: In battle, Blaziken blows out intense flames from its wrists and attacks foes courageously.

name: Mudkip
description: The fin on Mudkip's head acts as highly sensitive radar. Using this fin, it can sense movements of water.

name: Marshtomp
description: Its body is covered with a thin, sticky film that enables it to live on land. It plays in the mud.

name: Swampert
description: Swampert is very strong. It has enough power to easily drag a boulder weighing more than a ton.

name: Poochyena
description: At first sight, Poochyena takes a bite at anything that moves. This Pokémon chases after prey until it tires.

name: Mightyena
description: It gives obvious signals when it is preparing to attack. It utters a deep growl as it takes a stance.

name: Zigzagoon
description: It walks in zigzag fashion. It is good at finding items in the grass and even in the ground.

name: Linoone
description: It is exceedingly fast if it only has to run in a straight line. When it spots prey, it delivers a high-speed tackle.

name: Wurmple
description: It often lives in forests and tall grass. It sticks to tree branches and eats leaves.

name: Silcoon
description: It wraps silk around its body to protect itself from enemies. It hangs from tree branches while waiting for evolution.

name: Beautifly
description: It has a very aggressive nature. It stabs prey with its long, thin mouth to drain their body fluids.

name: Cascoon
description: It makes its protective shell by wrapping itself in silk. It is very patient and never moves.

name: Dustox
description: It is a nocturnal Pokémon. When it flaps its wings, it scatters a fine dust that is highly toxic.

name: Lotad
description: It looks like an aquatic plant and serves as a ferry to Pokémon that can't swim.

name: Lombre
description: It is nocturnal and becomes active at night. It lives in water but can also move on land.

name: Ludicolo
description: If it hears festive music, all its muscles become filled with energy. It can't help but start dancing.

name: Seedot
description: It looks exactly like an acorn when it is hanging from a tree branch. It startles other Pokémon by suddenly moving.

name: Nuzleaf
description: It lives in deep forests. It is skilled at climbing trees. It uses its long nose to play a grass flute.

name: Shiftry
description: It is said to arrive on chilly winds at the start of winter. It can create windstorms with its fan-like hands.

name: Taillow
description: It has a gutsy spirit that makes it bravely take on any opponent, no matter how strong.

name: Swellow
description: It dives at a steep angle as soon as it spots its prey. It never misses its target.

name: Wingull
description: It makes its nest on steep seaside cliffs. It can soar on the sea breeze without flapping its wings.

name: Pelipper
description: It is a messenger of the skies. It carries small Pokémon and eggs inside its massive bill.

name: Ralts
description: It is highly attuned to the emotions of people and Pokémon. It hides if it senses hostility.

name: Kirlia
description: It is said that a Kirlia that is exposed to the positive emotions of its trainer grows beautiful.

name: Gardevoir
description: It has the power to predict the future. Its power peaks when it is protecting its trainer.

name: Surskit
description: It can walk on water as if it were skating. It draws prey with a sweet aroma from its head.

name: Masquerain
description: Its antennae have eye-like patterns that it uses to intimidate enemies. It can fly in any direction.

name: Shroomish
description: It lives in damp soil in the dark of forests. It eats fallen leaves that have turned into compost.

name: Breloom
description: It scatters poisonous spores from the holes in its cap. It is skilled at fighting with its short arms.

name: Slakoth
description: It spends nearly all its time lying down and lounging. It eats just three leaves a day.

name: Vigoroth
description: It is always hungry and impatient. It can't stand to be still, so it is always running around.

name: Slaking
description: It is the world's most slothful Pokémon. However, it can exert horrifying power by releasing pent-up energy.

name: Nincada
description: It lives underground for many years. It uses its sharp claws to carve the roots of trees.

name: Ninjask
description: It moves so fast that it is nearly invisible. It is often heard but not seen.

name: Shedinja
description: A discarded bug shell that came to life. It is said that peering into the hole on its back will steal one's spirit.

name: Whismur
description: It usually whispers, but if it senses danger, it cries out at a volume that can cause headaches.

name: Loudred
description: It generates ultrasonic waves by shouting. The waves are strong enough to shatter wood.

name: Exploud
description: It emits a variety of sounds from the ports on its body. Its bellows can be heard from miles away.

name: Makuhita
description: It toughens its body by slamming into thick trees. It never gives up, no matter how many times it is knocked down.

name: Hariyama
description: It has the habit of challenging others without hesitation. It can send a truck flying with a single slap.

name: Azurill
description: It has a bouncy, rubbery body. It can jump over obstacles by bouncing on its large tail.

name: Nosepass
description: Its nose is a magnet. It always faces north. Two Nosepass can never face each other.

name: Skitty
description: It is adorable and very popular as a pet. It has the habit of chasing its own tail until it gets dizzy.

name: Delcatty
description: It is a very clean Pokémon that spends most of its time grooming its fur. It is very fickle.

name: Sableye
description: It lives in deep caves. It eats gemstones that it finds in the ground. Its eyes are like jewels.

name: Mawile
description: It has a second set of jaws on the back of its head. It uses its cute face to lull enemies into a false sense of security.

name: Aron
description: It eats iron to build its steel body. It sometimes eats railroad tracks, causing major problems.

name: Lairon
description: It is very protective of its territory. It will charge at anything that enters its domain.

name: Aggron
description: It claims an entire mountain as its territory. It will ruthlessly beat down anything that enters.

name: Meditite
description: It meditates for hours every day. Through meditation, it heightens its inner energy and can fly.

name: Medicham
description: Through yoga, it has gained the power to predict its enemy's next move. It fights with elegant movements.

name: Electrike
description: It stores electricity in its long fur. It runs so fast that it creates friction and generates more power.

name: Manectric
description: It is said to make its nest where lightning has struck. It discharges electricity from its mane.

name: Plusle
description: It cheers on its partners with pom-poms made of sparks. It absorbs electricity from telephone poles.

name: Minun
description: It loves to cheer on its partners. It creates a short circuit in its body to release sparks.

name: Volbeat
description: It lives near clean water. At night, it uses its tail to draw patterns in the sky with light.

name: Illumise
description: It uses a sweet aroma to lead Volbeat. It is very skilled at drawing patterns in the night sky.

name: Roselia
description: The flowers on its arms release a relaxing aroma. The stronger the scent, the healthier the Roselia.

name: Gulpin
description: Nearly all its body is its stomach. It can digest anything, even scrap iron.

name: Swalot
description: It has no teeth. It swallows anything whole. Its powerful stomach acid can dissolve anything.

name: Carvanha
description: It has extremely strong jaws. It will attack anything that enters its territory in a group.

name: Sharpedo
description: It is the bully of the sea. It can swim at speeds of over 75 mph by spraying water from its rear.

name: Wailmer
description: It can store a massive amount of water in its body. It can bounce like a ball on land.

name: Wailord
description: It is the largest of all Pokémon. It can dive to depths of over 10,000 feet on a single breath.

name: Numel
description: It stores magma in the hump on its back. It is very slow and dull-witted.

name: Camerupt
description: It has volcanoes on its back. If it gets angry, the volcanoes erupt, spraying magma everywhere.

name: Torkoal
description: It burns coal inside its shell for energy. It blows out black smoke from its nostrils when it is angry.

name: Spoink
description: It bounces on its tail to keep its heart beating. If it stops bouncing, its heart will stop.

name: Grumpig
description: It uses the black pearls on its body to amplify its psychokinetic powers. It dances while it fights.

name: Spinda
description: No two Spinda have the same spot patterns. It walks with a dizzy, stumbling gait.

name: Trapinch
description: It lives in arid deserts. It makes a bowl-shaped pit in the sand and waits for prey to fall in.

name: Vibrava
description: It generates ultrasonic waves by vibrating its wings. The waves are strong enough to cause headaches.

name: Flygon
description: It is known as the spirit of the desert. It creates sandstorms by flapping its wings.

name: Cacnea
description: It lives in arid deserts. It can survive for 30 days without water by storing it in its body.

name: Cacturne
description: It becomes active at night. It tracks travelers who are exhausted by the desert heat.

name: Swablu
description: It has wings like fluffy white clouds. It is very clean and loves to wash itself in springs.

name: Altaria
description: It flies gracefully through the sky. Its humming has a mysterious power to make listeners feel dreamy.

name: Zangoose
description: It has a long-standing feud with Seviper. Its sharp claws are its best weapons.

name: Seviper
description: It sharpens its sword-like tail on rocks. It has a long-standing feud with Zangoose.

name: Lunatone
description: It was first discovered at the site of a meteor strike. It becomes active during the full moon.

name: Solrock
description: It is said to have fallen from space. It rotates its body to release intense heat and light.

name: Barboach
description: Its body is covered with a slimy film. It lives in the mud at the bottom of rivers.

name: Whiscash
description: It is very territorial. It can cause earthquakes by thrashing about in the water.

name: Corphish
description: It was originally brought from overseas. It is very hardy and can live in polluted water.

name: Crawdaunt
description: It is a very aggressive Pokémon. It will challenge anything that enters its territory.

name: Baltoy
description: It moves by spinning on its single foot. It was first discovered in ancient ruins.

name: Claydol
description: It is said to have been made from clay by ancient people. It can fly by using psychic power.

name: Lileep
description: It was regenerated from a fossil. It lives on the sea floor and catches prey with its tentacles.

name: Cradily
description: It lives in the shallows of warm seas. When the tide goes out, it digs into the sand to hide.

name: Anorith
description: It was regenerated from a fossil. It lived in the sea and swam using its eight wings.

name: Armaldo
description: It is a prehistoric Pokémon. It has a tough shell that protects it from attacks.

name: Feebas
description: It is a very hardy Pokémon that can live in any kind of water. It is not very pretty.

name: Milotic
description: It is said to be the most beautiful of all Pokémon. It has the power to calm angry feelings.

name: Castform
description: Its appearance changes with the weather. It was created by scientists at a weather institute.

name: Kecleon
description: It can change its body color to blend in with its surroundings. It is very hard to spot.

name: Shuppet
description: It feeds on negative emotions like envy and malice. It lives under the eaves of houses.

name: Banette
description: A doll that became a Pokémon over its grudge of being thrown away. It seeks the child that abandoned it.

name: Duskull
description: It can pass through any wall. It is said to take away children who don't listen to their parents.

name: Dusclops
description: Its body is hollow. It is said that anyone who looks into its body will have their spirit stolen.

name: Tropius
description: It lives in tropical jungles. The fruit that grows around its neck is very sweet and delicious.

name: Chimecho
description: It makes a sound like a wind chime. It uses its long tail to hang from tree branches.

name: Absol
description: It is known as the disaster Pokémon. It appears before people to warn them of impending danger.

name: Wynaut
description: It lives in caves and travels in herds. It squeezes against others to toughen its spirit.

name: Snorunt
description: It lives in snowy regions. It is said that a house visited by a Snorunt will prosper.

name: Glalie
description: Its body is made of rock and ice. It can freeze the moisture in the air to make its own armor.

name: Spheal
description: It is a very round Pokémon. It moves by rolling across the ice like a ball.

name: Sealeo
description: It lives on ice floes. It has a habit of spinning things on its nose to see how they balance.

name: Walrein
description: It has thick blubber that protects it from the cold. Its large tusks can shatter ice.

name: Clamperl
description: It is protected by a sturdy shell. It makes a single pearl that is said to amplify psychic power.

name: Huntail
description: It lives in the deep sea. It uses its tail, which looks like a small fish, to lure in prey.

name: Gorebyss
description: It lives in the deep sea. It has a long, thin mouth that it uses to drain the fluids from its prey.

name: Relicanth
description: A rare Pokémon that was discovered during a deep-sea exploration. It has not changed in 100 million years.

name: Luvdisc
description: A heart-shaped Pokémon that lives in warm seas. It is said that couples who find one will be blessed.

name: Bagon
description: It dreams of flying through the sky. It toughens its head by smashing it against rocks.

name: Shelgon
description: Its body is covered with a hard shell. It stays inside the shell and waits for evolution.

name: Salamence
description: It finally achieved its dream of flying. It is a very powerful and aggressive Pokémon.

name: Beldum
description: It moves by using magnetic force. It communicates with others by using magnetic pulses.

name: Metang
description: It is formed by two Beldum joining together. It has two brains that are linked by magnetic force.

name: Metagross
description: It is formed by two Metang joining together. It has four brains that are linked by magnetic force.

name: Regirock
description: Its body is made entirely of rocks. If it gets damaged in battle, it repairs itself with new rocks.

name: Regice
description: Its body is made of ice from the ice age. It cannot be melted, even by fire.

name: Registeel
description: Its body is made of a mysterious metal that is harder than any other. It is hollow inside.

name: Latias
description: It is highly intelligent and can understand human speech. It can change its appearance to hide.

name: Latios
description: It is highly intelligent and can understand human speech. It can fly faster than a jet plane.

name: Kyogre
description: It is said to be the personification of the sea. It has the power to cause massive rainstorms.

name: Groudon
description: It is said to be the personification of the land. It has the power to cause massive droughts.

name: Rayquaza
description: It lives in the ozone layer and feeds on meteorites. It can calm the battle between Kyogre and Groudon.

name: Jirachi
description: It is said to grant any wish that is written on the notes on its head. It wakes up once every 1,000 years.

name: Deoxys
description: An alien Pokémon that was created from a space virus. It can change its form to suit its needs.

name: Turtwig
description: It lives near lakes. The shell on its back is made of soil and becomes harder when it drinks water.

name: Grotle
description: It lives in forests near water. It knows where pure water wells up and carries other Pokémon there.

name: Torterra
description: Small Pokémon sometimes gather on its back to build their nests. It is a very large and slow Pokémon.

name: Chimchar
description: It is very agile and can climb steep cliffs. The fire on its tail is fueled by gas in its belly.

name: Monferno
description: It uses ceilings and walls to launch aerial attacks. The fire on its tail is a sign of its power.

name: Infernape
description: It uses a unique style of martial arts that involves all its limbs. It is very fast and powerful.

name: Piplup
description: It is very proud and dislikes being taken care of. It is a poor walker but a very good swimmer.

name: Prinplup
description: It lives alone on icy shores. Its wings can deliver powerful blows that can snap thick trees.

name: Empoleon
description: It is very territorial and will attack anything that enters its area. Its wings are as sharp as blades.

name: Starly
description: It travels in large flocks. It is very noisy and will chirp loudly if it is separated from its flock.

name: Staravia
description: It lives in forests and fields. It is very territorial and will fiercely protect its nesting area.

name: Staraptor
description: It is a very brave Pokémon that will never back down from a fight. It has very strong wings.

name: Bidoof
description: It has nerves of steel and is never bothered by anything. It is a very common sight near water.

name: Bibarel
description: It makes its nest by damming up rivers with bark and mud. It is a very good swimmer.

name: Kricketot
description: It communicates by rubbing its antennae together. The sound it makes is like a xylophone.

name: Kricketune
description: It uses its knife-like arms to make music. It can change the melody to express its feelings.

name: Shinx
description: It can make its fur glow brightly to blind its enemies. It is a very cute and popular Pokémon.

name: Luxio
description: It can release strong electrical pulses from its claws. It lives in small groups with its kind.

name: Luxray
description: It has eyes that can see through anything. It uses this power to hunt for prey and find its young.

name: Budew
description: It lives near clean water. It releases pollen that causes harsh sneezing and runny noses.

name: Roserade
description: It lures in prey with its sweet aroma. It uses its flower-like arms to deliver poisonous stabs.

name: Cranidos
description: It lived in jungles 100 million years ago. Its skull is as hard as iron and can shatter trees.

name: Rampardos
description: Its skull is 12 inches thick. It can deliver powerful headbutts that can knock down buildings.

name: Shieldon
description: It lived in jungles 100 million years ago. Its face is as hard as iron and can block any attack.

name: Bastiodon
description: It is a very defensive Pokémon. It can block any attack with its shield-like face.

name: Burmy
description: It makes a cloak out of things it finds nearby. If its cloak is damaged, it quickly makes a new one.

name: 脫脫worm
description: Its appearance changes depending on the cloak it wore as a Burmy. It is a very hardy Pokémon.

name: Mothim
description: It loves the honey of Combee. It doesn't have its own nest and travels from place to place.

name: Combee
description: It travels in large swarms to collect honey. It is very loyal to its queen, Vespiquen.

name: Vespiquen
description: It is the queen of the Combee swarm. It uses its honeycomb-like body to raise its young.

name: Pachirisu
description: It lives in trees and stores electricity in its cheek pouches. It is a very cute and popular Pokémon.

name: Buizel
description: It can inflate the flotation sac around its neck to keep its head above water. It is a very fast swimmer.

name: Floatzel
description: It can rescue people from drowning by using its flotation sac. It is a very brave and helpful Pokémon.

name: Cherubi
description: It lives in sunny places. The small ball on its head is full of nutrients that it needs to evolve.

name: Cherrim
description: Its appearance changes with the sunlight. It is very quiet and shy when it is cloudy.

name: Shellos
description: Its appearance changes depending on the sea it lives in. It is a very soft and squishy Pokémon.

name: Gastrodon
description: It lives in shallow seas. It has a very tough skin that protects it from predators.

name: Ambipom
description: It uses its two tails to perform complex tasks. It lives in large groups in the forest.

name: Drifloon
description: It is said to take away children who mistake it for a balloon. It is a very mysterious Pokémon.

name: Drifblim
description: It can carry people and Pokémon across the sky. It is very quiet and peaceful.

name: Buneary
description: It is very shy and will hide if it is scared. It has very strong legs and can jump very high.

name: Lopunny
description: It is very proud of its fluffy fur. It is a very fast and agile Pokémon.

name: Mismagius
description: It can cast spells that cause people to fall in love or have bad luck. It is a very mysterious Pokémon.

name: Honchkrow
description: It is the leader of the Murkrow flock. It is very intelligent and will never forget a grudge.

name: Glameow
description: It is very fickle and will only listen to people it likes. It is a very cute and popular Pokémon.

name: Purugly
description: It is a very aggressive Pokémon. It will challenge anything that enters its territory.

name: Chingling
description: It emits cries by vibrating its body. Its cries are said to be imitations of its parents’ voices.

name: Stunky
description: It sprays a foul fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours.

name: Skuntank
description: It sprays a vile-smelling fluid from its tail. The fluid smells worse the longer it ages.

name: Bronzor
description: Ancient people believed it was a mirror for the sun. It has mysterious powers.

name: Bronzong
description: It brought rain by opening portals to another world. Revered as a bringer of harvest.

name: Bonsly
description: It looks as if it is crying, but its tears are actually sweat. It prefers dry climates.

name: Mime Jr.
description: It mimics the expressions and movements of those it sees to make friends.

name: Happiny
description: It carries a round stone in its pouch to imitate Chansey. It loves to roll it around.

name: Chatot
description: It can learn and mimic human speech. Its cries sound like melodies.

name: Spiritomb
description: It was bound to a fissure in an odd keystone as punishment for misdeeds.

name: Gible
description: It nests in small caves. It chomps on anything with its sharp teeth.

name: Gabite
description: It loves sparkly things. It hoards gems and treasures in its nest.

name: Garchomp
description: It flies at sonic speed. Its body is covered in sharp scales.

name: Munchlax
description: It eats anything, even if it’s inedible. It stores food in its fur.

name: Riolu
description: It can sense emotions through aura. It is very loyal to its trainer.

name: Lucario
description: It can detect aura and read thoughts. Revered as a hero in many cultures.

name: Hippopotas
description: It lives in arid places. It covers itself in sand to avoid germs.

name: Hippowdon
description: It exhales sandstorms from its body. It is very territorial.

name: Skorupi
description: It grips prey with its claws and injects poison. It can survive without food for a year.

name: Drapion
description: Its body is hard as steel. It is known as the sand demon.

name: Croagunk
description: It makes noise by inflating its poison sacs. It is sly and cunning.

name: Toxicroak
description: It croaks to advertise its poison. Its knuckle claws are deadly.

name: Carnivine
description: It hangs from branches using its tentacles. It looks like a plant to lure in prey.

name: Finneon
description: The way its two tail fins flutter when it swims has earned it the nickname 'Beautifly of the Sea'.

name: Lumineon
description: It lives on the deep-sea floor. It attracts prey by flashing the patterns on its four tail fins.

name: Mantyke
description: A friendly Pokémon that captures the subtle flows of ocean currents using its two antennae.

name: Snover
description: During cold seasons, it migrates to the mountain's lower reaches. It hides itself in deep snow.

name: Abomasnow
description: It blankets wide areas in snow by whipping up blizzards. It is also known as the Ice Monster.

name: Weavile
description: They live in cold regions, forming groups of four or five that hunt with impressive coordination.

name: Magnezone
description: It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.

name: Lickilicky
description: It wraps things with its extensible tongue. Getting too close to it will leave you soaked with saliva.

name: Rhyperior
description: It puts rocks in holes in its palms and uses its muscles to shoot them out.

name: Tangrowth
description: It ensnares prey by extending arms made of vines. Losing one of its arms doesn't bother it.

name: Electivire
description: It pushes the tips of its two tails against the foe, then lets loose with over 20,000 volts of power.

name: Magmortar
description: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit from the ends of its arms.

name: Togekiss
description: It will never appear where there is strife. It is said to share many blessings with people.

name: Yanmega
description: This six-legged Pokémon is easily capable of transporting an adult in flight. The wings on its tail help it stay balanced.

name: Leafeon
description: Just like a plant, it uses photosynthesis. As a result, it is always enveloped in clear air.

name: Glaceon
description: By controlling its body heat, it can freeze the atmosphere around it to make a diamond-dust flurry.

name: Gliscor
description: It observes prey while hanging inverted from branches. When the chance presents itself, it swoops!

name: Mamoswine
description: A Pokémon that flourished 10,000 years ago. It has become plentiful in recent years.

name: Porygon-Z
description: Additional software was installed to make it a better Pokémon. It began acting oddly, however.

name: Gallade
description: A master of courtesy and swordsmanship, it fights using extending swords on its elbows.

name: Probopass
description: It freely controls three small units called Mini-Noses using magnetic force.

name: Dusknoir
description: The antenna on its head captures radio waves from the world of spirits that instruct it to take people there.

name: Froslass
description: It freezes foes with an icy breath nearly -60 degrees Fahrenheit. What seems to be its body is actually hollow.

name: Rotom
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.

name: Uxie
description: Known as 'The Being of Knowledge.' It is said that it can wipe out the memory of those who see its eyes.

name: Mesprit
description: Known as 'The Being of Emotion.' It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy.

name: Azelf
description: Known as 'The Being of Willpower.' It sleeps at the bottom of a lake to keep the world in balance.

name: Dialga
description: It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity.

name: Palkia
description: It has the ability to distort space. It described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.

name: Heatran
description: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.

name: Regigigas
description: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokémon towed continents with ropes.

name: Giratina
description: It was banished for its violence. It silently gazed upon the old world from the Distortion World.

name: Cresselia
description: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

name: Phione
description: It drifts in warm seas. It always returns to where it was born, no matter how far it has drifted.

name: Manaphy
description: It is born with a wondrous power that lets it bond with any kind of Pokémon.

name: Darkrai
description: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.

name: Shaymin
description: It can dissolve toxins in the air to instantly transform ruined land into a lush field of flowers.

name: Arceus
description: It is described in mythology as the Pokémon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms.

name: Victini
description: It is said that a Trainer with a Victini will always win, regardless of the type of encounter.

name: Snivy
description: It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to sunlight makes its movements swifter.

name: Servine
description: It moves along the ground as if sliding. Its swift movements befuddle its foes.

name: Serperior
description: It only gives its all against strong opponents who are not intimidated by the glare from its noble eyes.

name: Tepig
description: It can deftly dodge its foe's attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them.

name: Pignite
description: The more it eats, the more fuel it has to burn in its chest, which in turn increases its speed.

name: Emboar
description: It can throw a punch that is set ablaze with fire. It flouts a beard of fire.

name: Oshawott
description: It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing.

name: Dewott
description: Strict training and use of the twin scalchops help it learn its fluid, swordsmanship-like movements.

name: Samurott
description: One swing of the sword incorporated into its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them can quiet everybody.

name: Patrat
description: Extremely cautious, they take turns standing guard while others forage. They use food stored in cheek pouches to survive.

name: Watchog
description: When they see an enemy, their tails stand straight up. They spit seeds from their mouths with great force.

name: Lillipup
description: It faces strong opponents with great courage. It is very intelligent and can accurately judge an opponent's strength.

name: Herdier
description: Its black, cape-like fur is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.

name: Stoutland
description: It rescues people stranded by blizzards in the mountains. Its shaggy fur shields it from the cold.

name: Purrloin
description: They steal from people for fun, but their victims can't help but forgive them because of their charming gestures.

name: Liepard
description: These Pokémon vanish and appear unexpectedly. Many Trainers are drawn to their beautiful form and fur.

name: Pansage
description: This Pokémon dwells in deep forests. Eating a leaf from its head can help a weary person feel refreshed.

name: Simisage
description: Ill-tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around. The leaf on its head is very bitter.

name: Pansear
description: When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Simisear
description: A flame burns inside its body. It scatters embers from its head and tail to sear its opponents.

name: Panpour
description: The water stored in the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants watered with it grow large.

name: Simipour
description: The high-pressure water expelled from its tail can easily burn through a concrete wall.

name: Munna
description: Munna eats the dreams of people and Pokémon. When it eats a pleasant dream, it expels pink mist.

name: Musharna
description: The mist emanating from its forehead is packed with the dreams of people and Pokémon.

name: Pidove
description: These Pokémon are respectful of their Trainers. It is said that they are not very good at remembering things.

name: Tranquill
description: No matter where in the world it goes, it knows where its nest is, so it never gets separated from its Trainer.

name: Unfezant
description: Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females' flying abilities surpass those of the males.

name: Blitzle
description: Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use their manes to communicate by flashing.

name: Zebstrika
description: It has lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika runs at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.

name: Roggenrola
description: Its body is as hard as steel. Born deep underground, it has a body as hard as diamond.

name: Boldore
description: When it is full of power, its orange crystals glow. It searches for underground water in caves.

name: Gigalith
description: The orange crystals on its body absorb solar energy, which it then fires from its mouth.

name: Woobat
description: It leaves a heart-shaped mark when it suctions itself onto a wall. It is said to bring good luck.

name: Swoobat
description: It shakes its tail vigorously when it emits ultrasonic waves strong enough to destroy concrete.

name: Drilbur
description: It can dig through the ground at a speed of over 30 mph by spinning its body like a drill.

name: Excadrill
description: It can help in tunnel construction. Its drill has evolved into steel that can perforate iron plates.

name: Audino
description: It touches others with the feelers on its ears and uses the sound of their heartbeats to tell how they are feeling.

name: Timburr
description: It always carries a square wooden log. It helps out with construction and gets stronger as it grows.

name: Gurdurr
description: With its strengthened body, it skillfully wields a steel beam to take down its enemies.

name: Conkeldurr
description: It is thought that Conkeldurr taught humans how to make concrete more than 2,000 years ago.

name: Tympole
description: They use high-frequency sounds to communicate. To humans, these sounds sound like singing.

name: Palpitoad
description: When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land.

name: Seismitoad
description: By vibrating the lumps on its fists, it can double the power of its punches. It shoots paralyzing liquid.

name: Throh
description: When it tightens its belt, it becomes stronger. Wild Throh use vines to weave their own belts.

name: Sawk
description: The sound of Sawk punching boulders can be heard from the mountains where they train.

name: Sewaddle
description: Since this Pokémon makes its own clothes out of leaves, it is a popular mascot for fashion designers.

name: Swadloon
description: Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they leave behind enrich the soil.

name: Leavanny
description: It weaves clothing for small Pokémon using its cutters and a sticky silk it produces from its mouth.

name: Venipede
description: Its bite injects a potent poison. This Pokémon is highly aggressive and will bite anything that moves.

name: Whirlipede
description: Protected by its hard shell, it spins its body like a tire and crashes furiously into its enemies.

name: Scolipede
description: With quick movements, it chases down its enemies and attacks them with the horns on its head.

name: Cottonee
description: When attacked, it expels cotton from its body. The cotton it shoots can be used as a decoy.

name: Whimsicott
description: It can pass through even the narrowest cracks. It leaves balls of white fluff behind as a prank.

name: Petilil
description: The leaves on its head are very bitter, but they have a revitalizing effect when eaten.

name: Lilligant
description: The fragrance of the flower on its head has a relaxing effect, but it is hard to get it to bloom.

name: Basculin
description: Red- and blue-striped Basculin are very hostile and are always fighting each other.

name: Sandile
description: They live buried in the sands of the desert. The black membrane surrounding their eyes protects them.

name: Krokorok
description: The special membrane covering its eyes can sense the heat of objects, so it can see in the dark.

name: Krookodile
description: They are very aggressive. It is said that Krookodile never allows its prey to escape.

name: Darumaka
description: When its internal fire burns, it is very active. When the fire dies down, it falls asleep.

name: Darmanitan
description: Its internal fire burns at 2,500 degrees Fahrenheit, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck.

name: Maractus
description: It uses an up-tempo song and dance to drive away the bird Pokémon that prey on its flower seeds.

name: Dwebble
description: It can easily drill into rocks with its claws. It chooses a suitable rock and carves it into a home.

name: Crustle
description: It possesses great strength in its legs, allowing it to carry heavy slabs of rock for many days.

name: Scraggy
description: Its skin has the elasticity of rubber. It protects itself by pulling its skin up to its neck.

name: Scrafty
description: Groups of them can be found in slums. They are very territorial and will kick anyone who enters.

name: Sigilyph
description: They never vary their flying patterns. They are said to be the guardians of an ancient city.

name: Yamask
description: The mask it carries used to be its face when it was human. It sometimes looks at it and cries.

name: Cofagrigus
description: It swallows those who get too close and turns them into mummies. It is covered in pure gold.

name: Tirtouga
description: It lived in the sea about 100 million years ago. It can dive to depths of 3,000 feet.

name: Carracosta
description: It can live both on land and in the sea. A slap from one of its flippers can shatter a steel beam.

name: Archen
description: It is said to be the ancestor of bird Pokémon. It cannot fly but can hop between tree branches.

name: Archeops
description: It can run faster than it can fly. It catches prey with its quick movements and sharp claws.

name: Trubbish
description: It was born from the combination of industrial waste and discarded stuffed dolls.

name: Garbodor
description: It consumes garbage to make poison. It sprays poison gas from the fingertips of its right hand.

name: Zorua
description: It often transforms into a silent child. It uses its illusions to hide its true identity.

name: Zoroark
description: Each has the ability to fool a large group of people simultaneously. They protect their lair with illusions.

name: Minccino
description: They use their tails to sweep up dust and dirt. They are very clean and will not tolerate a messy nest.

name: Cinccino
description: Its white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it difficult for enemies to grab it.

name: Gothita
description: They use their ribbon-like feelers to amplify their psychic power. They stare intently at things.

name: Gothorita
description: They use psychic power to control people and Pokémon. They are said to be active at night.

name: Gothitelle
description: They can see the future from the movement of the stars. They know the lifespans of their Trainers.

name: Solosis
description: It lives in a liquid that allows it to survive in any environment. It communicates via telepathy.

name: Duosion
description: Since it has two brains, it can perform two different actions at the same time.

name: Reuniclus
description: They use their psychic power to control their liquid-like arms to crush boulders.

name: Ducklett
description: They are talented swimmers. They dive underwater to eat their favorite food, peat moss.

name: Swanna
description: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The leader of the flock is the one with the most beautiful dance.

name: Vanillite
description: This Pokémon was born from an icicle that was hit by the morning sun. It exhales cold air.

name: Vanillish
description: They live in snowy mountains. They freeze their enemies by blowing cold air at them.

name: Vanilluxe
description: If both of its heads get angry at the same time, it can cause a massive blizzard.

name: Deerling
description: The color of its fur changes with the seasons. It lives in areas with clear seasonal changes.

name: Sawsbuck
description: The plants growing on its horns change with the seasons. The leader of the herd has the grandest horns.

name: Emolga
description: It glides from trees using its cape-like membrane while discharging electricity.

name: Karrablast
description: It attacks Shelmet to steal its shell. It evolves when it is bathed in a special electrical energy.

name: Escavalier
description: They fly around at high speed and strike with their pointed spears. They are brave in battle.

name: Foongus
description: It lures Pokémon with its Poké Ball-like pattern and then releases a cloud of poisonous spores.

name: Amoonguss
description: It shows off its Poké Ball patterns to lure prey, but it doesn't work very well.

name: Frillish
description: They use their veil-like arms to wrap around their prey and then drag them to the bottom of the ocean.

name: Jellicent
description: They are said to have a castle made of sunken ships at the bottom of the ocean.

name: Alomomola
description: It floats on the ocean's surface. When it finds a wounded Pokémon, it embraces it and heals it.

name: Joltik
description: Since it can't create its own electricity, it attaches itself to larger Pokémon and absorbs their static electricity.

name: Galvantula
description: It sets traps with electrified silk. It then uses its fangs to deliver a fatal shock.

name: Ferroseed
description: It sticks its spikes into cave walls and absorbs the minerals from the rock.

name: Ferrothorn
description: It fights by swinging its three spiky feelers. A hit from one of them can shatter a boulder.

name: Klink
description: The two gears are fixed together. They spin and generate the energy they need to live.

name: Klang
description: By changing the direction in which its gears rotate, it communicates its feelings to its friends.

name: Klinklang
description: Its red core functions as an energy tank. It fires the energy it has stored through its spikes.

name: Tynamo
description: While one alone doesn't have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.

name: Eelektrik
description: It coils around its foes and shocks them with electricity. It has a big appetite.

name: Eelektross
description: With their huge mouths, they suck in prey. They use their strength to drag prey into the ocean.

name: Elgyem
description: It uses its strong psychic power to squeeze its opponent's brain, causing a splitting headache.

name: Beheeyem
description: It can use its psychic powers to control an opponent's memories. It communicates by flashing its fingers.

name: Litwick
description: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life force of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.

name: Lampent
description: This Pokémon appears just before someone passes away, so it's feared as a bringer of ill luck.

name: Chandelure
description: The spirits burned up in its ominous flame lose their way and wander this world forever.

name: Axew
description: They play-fight by crushing berries with their tusks. This regrows them to be much harder and sharper.

name: Fraxure
description: Their tusks can shatter rocks. Territory battles between Fraxure can be intensely violent.

name: Haxorus
description: They are kind but can be relentless when defending territory. They challenge foes with tusks that can cut steel.

name: Cubchoo
description: Its nose is always running. It sniffs the snot back up because the snot provides the raw material for its moves.

name: Beartic
description: It can make its breath freeze at will. It is very adept at swimming and can hunt in the cold northern seas.

name: Cryogonal
description: When its body temperature rises, it turns into steam and vanishes. It reappears when the temperature lowers.

name: Shelmet
description: It closes the lid of its shell to protect itself. It is a very popular Pokémon for its cool shell.

name: Accelgor
description: Having removed its heavy shell, it has become very light and can fight with ninja-like movements.

name: Stunfisk
description: Its skin is very hard. It smiles when it discharges electricity. It buries itself in the mud of the seashore.

name: Mienfoo
description: In battles, this Pokémon uses a combination of flowing moves. It uses its sharp claws to cut its enemies.

name: Mienshao
description: It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its attacks are so fast that they cannot even be seen.

name: Druddigon
description: It races through narrow caves, using its sharp claws to catch prey. The skin on its face is harder than a rock.

name: Golett
description: These Pokémon are thought to have been created by the science of an ancient civilization.

name: Golurk
description: It flies through the sky at Mach speeds by withdrawing its arms and legs and firing energy from its boosters.

name: Pawniard
description: They ignore their own injuries as they slash at their prey. They sharpen their blades on stones by the river.

name: Bisharp
description: It leads a group of Pawniard. It battles to become the leader of the group and will not stop until it wins.

name: Bouffalant
description: They charge anything that enters their territory. Their head-butts are powerful enough to derail a train.

name: Rufflet
description: They will challenge any opponent, no matter how strong. This is how they get stronger.

name: Braviary
description: The more scars they have on their chests, the more respect they get from their peers.

name: Vullaby
description: It can't fly yet. It protects its rear with a skull it finds. It chases after weak Pokémon.

name: Mandibuzz
description: They fly in circles in the sky, searching for weak Pokémon. They make their nests out of bones.

name: Heatmor
description: It draws in air through its tail, burns it with its internal fire, and then shoots it out as a fire tongue.

name: Durant
description: They build massive mazes as nests. They protect themselves from Heatmor by attacking in groups.

name: Deino
description: It can't see, so it tackles and bites everything it touches to learn about its surroundings.

name: Zweilous
description: The two heads do not get along. They compete with each other to see which one can eat more.

name: Hydreigon
description: The heads on their arms do not have brains. They use all three heads to consume and destroy everything.

name: Larvesta
description: It is said to have been born from the sun. It shoots fire from its five horns to repel attackers.

name: Volcarona
description: When it flies, it scatters its flaming scales. It was once feared as the embodiment of the sun.

name: Cobalion
description: This legendary Pokémon has a body and heart of steel. It worked with its allies to punish people when they hurt Pokémon.

name: Terrakion
description: Its charge is strong enough to break through a castle wall in one blow. This Pokémon is spoken of in legends.

name: Virizion
description: The horns on its head are as sharp as blades. It uses its quick movements to toy with its enemies.

name: Tornadus
description: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It flies through the sky at 200 mph.

name: Thundurus
description: The spikes on its tail discharge immense bolts of lightning. It flies around the Unova region firing off lightning.

name: Reshiram
description: This legendary Pokémon can scorch the world with fire. It helps those who want to build a world of truth.

name: Zekrom
description: This legendary Pokémon can scorch the world with lightning. It assists those who want to build an ideal world.

name: Landorus
description: Lands visited by Landorus grant such bountiful crops that it has been hailed as The Guardian of the Fields.

name: Kyurem
description: It can produce ultra-cold air. Its body is frozen. It is said that this Pokémon is from another world.

name: Keldeo
