description: By blasting water from its hooves, it can glide across water. It is said to be a member of the Swords of Justice.

name: Meloetta
description: Its melodies are filled with a strange power that can make the Pokémon around it feel happy or sad.

name: Genesect
description: Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma.

name: Chespin
description: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, they become sharp and tough enough to pierce rock.

name: Quilladin
description: It relies on its sturdy shell to deflect attacks. It counterattacks with its sharp quills.

name: Chesnaught
description: Its tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton truck. It shields its allies from danger with its own body.

name: Fennekin
description: Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Braixen
description: It has a twig stuck in its tail. With friction from its tail fur, it sets the twig on fire and fights with it.

name: Delphox
description: It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.

name: Froakie
description: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage Froakie takes from attacks.

name: Frogadier
description: Its swiftness is unparalleled. It can scale a tower of more than 2,000 feet in a minute's time.

name: Greninja
description: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal.

name: Bunnelby
description: It has ears like shovels. It digs through the ground at a speed of over 30 mph by spinning its body.

name: Diggersby
description: With their powerful ears, they can lift large boulders. They are very helpful on construction sites.

name: Fletchling
description: These Pokémon are very friendly. They use their beautiful voices to communicate with others.

name: Fletchinder
description: From its beak, it expels embers that set the grass on fire. It then pounces on the bewildered prey.

name: Talonflame
description: In the fever of an exciting battle, it showers embers from the gaps between its feathers and takes to the air.

name: Scatterbug
description: When attacked by a bird Pokémon, it spews a powder that causes paralysis on contact.

name: Spewpa
description: It lives hidden within thicket shadows. When predators approach, it makes its fur stand on end to threaten them.

name: Vivillon
description: The patterns on its wings depend on the climate and topography of its habitat. It scatters colorful scales.

name: Litleo
description: The stronger the opponent it faces, the more its mane glows with heat. It is very courageous.

name: Pyroar
description: The male with the largest mane of fire is the leader of the pride. The females work together to protect the young.

name: Flabébé
description: It draws out the hidden power of flowers and uses it. It is said to be the ancestor of all fairy Pokémon.

name: Floette
description: It flutters around that flower, which it has raised its whole life. It uses its flower to attack.

name: Florges
description: It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains energy from the flowers.

name: Skiddo
description: Thought to be one of the first Pokémon to live in harmony with humans, it has a placid disposition.

name: Gogoat
description: It can tell how its Trainer is feeling by subtle shifts in the grip on its horns. This empathy allows them to run as one.

name: Pancham
description: It does its best to be taken seriously by its enemies, but its glare is not sufficiently intimidating.

name: Pangoro
description: It has a leaf in its mouth. It can use its sharp claws to cut its enemies. It is very aggressive.

name: Furfrou
description: Trimming its fluffy fur not only makes it more elegant but also increases its swiftness.

name: Espurr
description: It has enough psychic energy to blast everything within 300 feet of itself, but it has no control over its power.

name: Meowstic
description: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck to dust.

name: Honedge
description: If anyone dares to grab its hilt, it wraps its blue cloth around that person's arm and drains that person's life energy.

name: Doublade
description: The two swords use telepathy to coordinate their attacks and slash their enemies to ribbons.

name: Aegislash
description: Generations of kings were attended by these Pokémon, which used their spectral power to manipulate and control people.

name: Spritzee
description: In the past, noblewomen carried this Pokémon with them instead of perfume. It emits a scent that varies with its diet.

name: Aromatisse
description: It devises various scents to gain the upper hand in battle. Some scents are so overwhelming that they can cause fainting.

name: Swirlix
description: Because it eats nothing but sweets, its fur is as sticky and sweet as cotton candy.

name: Slurpuff
description: Its sense of smell is 100 million times more sensitive than a human's. It can distinguish even the most subtle scents.

name: Inkay
description: Opponents who stare at the flashing lights on its body become dazed and lose their will to fight.

name: Malamar
description: It possesses the most powerful hypnotic powers of any Pokémon, and it can make its enemies do whatever it wants.

name: Binacle
description: They live in pairs on a single rock. If they don't get along, one of them will move to a different rock.

name: Barbaracle
description: Each of its seven hands has a brain of its own. They coordinate their movements to take down their enemies.

name: Skrelp
description: It camouflages itself as rotten kelp to hide from its enemies while it waits for its prey to swim by.

name: Dragalge
description: Their poison is strong enough to eat through the hull of a tanker. They are very territorial and aggressive.

name: Clauncher
description: It can fire compressed water from its claw. It uses the force of the water to propel itself through the sea.

name: Clawitzer
description: By expelling water from its nozzle, it can propel itself at a speed of 60 knots.

name: Helioptile
description: They flare the frills on the sides of their heads and absorb sunlight, which they then convert into electricity.

name: Heliolisk
description: They can generate enough electricity to power a skyscraper. They are very fast and can run on water.

name: Tyrunt
description: This Pokémon lived 100 million years ago. It is very selfish and will throw a fit if it doesn't get its way.

name: Tyrantrum
description: With jaws that can shred thick metal plates as if they were paper, this Pokémon was invincible in the ancient world.

name: Amaura
description: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. It has a calm disposition and lived in cold lands.

name: Aurorus
description: It can produce ultra-cold air. Aurorus can create a wall of ice to protect itself from its enemies.

name: Sylveon
description: It sends a soothing aura from its ribbonlike feelers to calm fights. It wraps its feelers around its beloved Trainer's arm.

name: Hawlucha
description: Although its body is small, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers like Machamp.

name: Dedenne
description: Its upper whiskers are sensors that survey its surroundings. Its lower whiskers are organs that emit electricity.

name: Carbink
description: Born from the temperatures and pressures deep underground, this Pokémon fires beams from the crystal in its head.

name: Goomy
description: The weakest Dragon-type Pokémon. It lives in damp, shady places, so its body doesn't dry out.

name: Sliggoo
description: It drives away enemies by excreting a sticky liquid that can dissolve anything. Its eyes have devolved.

name: Goodra
description: This very friendly Dragon-type Pokémon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving that person covered in sticky slime.

name: Klefki
description: These Pokémon have a habit of collecting keys. They will jingle their keys to threaten their opponents.

name: Phantump
description: According to legend, these Pokémon are the spirits of children who got lost and died in the forest.

name: Trevenant
description: It can control trees at will. It is kind to the forest Pokémon but traps humans who try to harm the woods.

name: Pumpkaboo
description: The pumpkin-shaped body is inhabited by a spirit. At night, it guides wandering spirits to the next world.

name: Gourgeist
description: It sings in a joyful voice while it wanders the streets on the night of the new moon.

name: Bergmite
description: It blocks opponents' attacks with its icy body. It freezes the air around it to create a shield of ice.

name: Avalugg
description: Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Several Bergmite could be found huddling on its back.

name: Noibat
description: It emits ultrasonic waves from its large ears. It uses these waves to search for its favorite fruit.

name: Noivern
description: They fly through the dark of night. Noivern is known for its cruel nature and its ultrasonic waves.

name: Xerneas
description: Legends say it can share eternal life. It slept for a thousand years in the form of a tree before its revival.

name: Yveltal
description: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon.

name: Zygarde
description: It's said to be monitoring the ecosystem. If the ecosystem falls into disarray, Zygarde appears.

name: Diancie
description: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.

name: Hoopa
description: It can warp space to move objects to distant places. It is said to have a mischievous personality.

name: Volcanion
description: It lets out billows of steam from the arms on its back. It uses the steam to hide in the fog.

name: Rowlet
description: This wary Pokémon uses photosynthesis to store up energy during the day, while becoming active at night.

name: Dartrix
description: It throws sharp feathers called blade quills at its enemies. It is very particular about its appearance.

name: Decidueye
description: It nocks and fires arrow quills from its wings with such precision that they can pierce a pebble at 100 yards.

name: Litten
description: It doesn't allow its emotions to be easily read. It spends its time grooming its fur and collecting it into balls.

name: Torracat
description: The bell-like organ at its throat is actually a flame sac. It lets out a high-pitched ring when Torracat breathes fire.

name: Incineroar
description: As its fighting spirit increases, the flames it spouts from around its waist become more intense.

name: Popplio
description: It can snort bubbles made of water and use them to perform acrobatic stunts. It is very hardworking.

name: Brionne
description: A skillful dancer, it creates bubbles and hops on them to move around. It always tries to be cheerful.

name: Primarina
description: It controls its water bubbles with its voice. The moon reflected on the bubbles creates a magical scene.

name: Pikipek
description: It can peck at a rate of 16 times per second. It uses its beak to drill holes in trees and store food.

name: Trumbeak
description: It eats berries and stores their seeds in its beak. When it encounters enemies, it fires off the seeds like bullets.

name: Toucannon
description: Within its beak, its internal gases ignite, firing seeds with enough force to shatter boulders.

name: Yungoos
description: It was brought into the Alola region to help deal with Rattata. It has a very aggressive nature.

name: Gumshoos
description: When it finds its favorite prey, it stakes out its territory and waits for the perfect moment to attack.

name: Grubbin
description: It uses its powerful mandibles as a weapon and a tool for burrowing. It loves electricity.

name: Charjabug
description: It stays motionless while it prepares for evolution. It stores enough electricity to power a house.

name: Vikavolt
description: It zips around at high speed, firing off beams of electricity. It is very territorial.

name: Crabrawler
description: It has a personality that hates to lose. It aims for the highest point in any area.

name: Crabominable
description: It got lost on a snowy mountain and evolved after developing a thick coat of fur to protect itself.

name: Oricorio
description: It changes its form by sipping the nectar of certain flowers. It has four different forms.

name: Cutiefly
description: It can sense the auras of people and Pokémon. It gathers near people with happy emotions.

name: Ribombee
description: It makes pollen puffs that can be used for food or as a weapon. Some pollen puffs have a healing effect.

name: Rockruff
description: This Pokémon has lived with people since ancient times. It has a very loyal and friendly nature.

name: Lycanroc
description: Its form changes depending on the time of day it evolved. It has Midday, Midnight, and Dusk forms.

name: Wishiwashi
description: When it's in trouble, it sends a signal to its friends. Together, they form a massive school.

name: Mareanie
description: It has ten tentacles on its head. It uses them to catch prey and defend its territory.

name: Toxapex
description: With its twelve legs, it creates a dome to protect itself. It's known for its cruel nature.

name: Mudbray
description: It was once found all over the world, but it was overhunted and is now only found in Alola.

name: Mudsdale
description: Known for its powerful kicks, its legs are so strong that a single blow can shatter a truck.

name: Dewpider
description: It carries a bubble of water on its head to breathe on land. It protects its soft head with the bubble.

name: Araquanid
description: It protects its small ones by keeping them inside the water bubble on its head.

name: Fomantis
description: It stays motionless during the day to soak up sunlight. It becomes active at night.

name: Lurantis
description: It uses its sickle-shaped arms to deliver powerful attacks. It is very particular about its appearance.

name: Morelull
description: It releases spores from its cap that have a drowsy effect. It lives in damp, dark forests.

name: Shiinotic
description: It lures its prey with flashing lights and then puts them to sleep with spores.

name: Salandit
description: It releases a toxic gas that can make people and Pokémon feel light-headed and dizzy.

name: Salazzle
description: Only the females evolve. They lead a pack of male Salandit and are very territorial.

name: Stufful
description: Despite its cute appearance, it has incredible physical strength. It hates being touched.

name: Bewear
description: This Pokémon is very dangerous. It has the habit of hugging its friends, which can be fatal.

name: Bounsweet
description: It releases a sweet scent that has a relaxing effect. It is a very popular Pokémon in Alola.

name: Steenee
description: It has a very cheerful personality. It uses its tough leaves to deliver powerful kicks.

name: Tsareena
description: A powerful dancer, its kicks can shatter a boulder. It is known for its noble personality.

name: Comfey
description: It picks flowers and carries them around. The scent of the flowers has a healing effect.

name: Oranguru
description: It is known for its high intelligence. It lives deep in the forest and is very helpful to other Pokémon.

name: Passimian
description: They live in groups and have a very strong sense of teamwork. They use berries as a weapon.

name: Wimpod
description: It's a very cowardly Pokémon. It will scurry away if it sees something moving.

name: Golisopod
description: With its six arms, it can deliver powerful strikes. It will do anything to win a battle.

name: Sandygast
description: Born from the grudges of people who died on the beach, it lures people to help it grow larger.

name: Palossand
description: It can control sand at will. It traps people and Pokémon in its body to drain their life energy.

name: Pyukumuku
description: It lives on the beach and is very territorial. It will spit out its internal organs to attack its enemies.

name: Type: Null
description: This artificial Pokémon was built to match the power of legendary Pokémon. It wears a heavy mask.

name: Silvally
description: It destroyed its own heavy mask after finding a partner it can trust. It can change its type.

name: Minior
description: It lives in the ozone layer and falls to the ground when its shell becomes too heavy.

name: Komala
description: It spends its whole life asleep. It eats, moves, and battles while it is dreaming.

name: Turtonator
description: The shell on its back is highly explosive. It waits for its enemies to step on its shell to trigger an explosion.

name: Togedemaru
description: The spikes on its back are actually sensory organs. It generates electricity by shaking its body.

name: Mimikyu
description: It wears a rag that looks like Pikachu to hide its true appearance. It is very lonely.

name: Bruxish
description: It releases psychic power from its head and has a very aggressive nature. It grinds its teeth loudly.

name: Drampa
description: It lives deep in the mountains and is very friendly to children. It will protect them at any cost.

name: Dhelmise
description: It is made of seaweed and an anchor. It uses the anchor to attack its enemies and defend itself.

name: Jangmo-o
description: It lives in the mountains and is very hardworking. It uses the scales on its head to communicate.

name: Hakamo-o
description: It dances to a rhythm while it battles. It uses its scales to deliver powerful strikes.

name: Kommo-o
description: With its clanging scales, it intimidates its enemies. It is known for its noble personality.

name: Tapu Koko
description: Known as the guardian deity of Melemele Island, it is very fast and has a curious nature.

name: Tapu Lele
description: The guardian deity of Akala Island, it scatters scales that have a healing effect.

name: Tapu Bulu
description: The guardian deity of Ula'ula Island, it can control plants and is very strong.

name: Tapu Fini
description: The guardian deity of Poni Island, it can control water and is known for its noble personality.

name: Cosmog
description: It's a very small Pokémon that came from another world. It is very friendly and curious.

name: Cosmoem
description: It stays motionless while it prepares for evolution. It is very heavy and has immense power.

name: Solgaleo
description: Known as the emissary of the sun, it can travel between worlds and has immense power.

name: Lunala
description: Known as the emissary of the moon, it can travel between worlds and has immense power.

name: Nihilego
description: This Ultra Beast came from another world. It has a parasitic nature and can control its host.

name: Buzzwole
description: This Ultra Beast has immense physical strength. It is known for its aggressive nature.

name: Pheromosa
description: This Ultra Beast is very fast and has a very elegant appearance. It is very territorial.

name: Xurkitree
description: This Ultra Beast generates immense amounts of electricity. It can be found in power plants.

name: Celesteela
description: This Ultra Beast has a very large body and can fly at high speeds. It is very territorial.

name: Kartana
description: This Ultra Beast is very fast and has sharp blades on its body. It can cut through anything.

name: Guzzlord
description: This Ultra Beast has a massive appetite and can consume anything. It is very dangerous.

name: Necrozma
description: It is said to have come from another world in ancient times. It is filled with light and has immense power.

name: Magearna
description: This artificial Pokémon was built 500 years ago by a scientist of uncommon genius.

name: Marshadow
description: It sinks into the shadows of people and Pokémon. While it hides, it copies their movements and power.

name: Poipole
description: This Ultra Beast is well enough loved to be chosen as a first partner in its own world.

name: Naganadel
description: It stores hundreds of liters of poisonous liquid inside its body. It fires the liquid from its needles.

name: Stakataka
description: It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one of the stones that makes up its body is a separate life-form.

name: Blacephalon
description: It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head to surprise them.

name: Zeraora
description: It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge, they'll still be electrocuted.

name: Meltan
description: It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the ground and absorbs them into its body of molten steel.

name: Melmetal
description: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron, this Pokémon eventually came back to life after 3,000 years.

name: Grookey
description: When it beats out a rhythm with its stick, the auditory waves it creates rejuvenate the plants in its surroundings.

name: Thwackey
description: The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers.

name: Rillaboom
description: By drumming, it taps into the power of its tree stump and controls the roots of the stump to battle.

name: Scorbunny
description: A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through its body. Once that happens, it’s ready to fight.

name: Raboot
description: Its fluffy fur protects it from the cold and enables it to use even hotter fire moves.

name: Cinderace
description: It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball to attack opponents.

name: Sobble
description: When it gets wet, its skin changes color, and this Pokémon becomes invisible as if it were camouflaged.

name: Drizzile
description: A clever Pokémon, it uses its long, moisture-covered tongue to strike at enemies with surprising speed.

name: Inteleon
description: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back for gliding.

name: Skwovet
description: It eats berries nonstop—a habit that has made it more resilient than it looks.

name: Greedent
description: It stashes berries in its tail—so many, in fact, that berries constantly drop out.

name: Rookidee
description: It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This spirit makes it very popular among Galar Trainers.

name: Corvisquire
description: Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and dropping them on foes.

name: Corviknight
description: With their great flying skills and high intelligence, these Pokémon have a very successful career as the Galar Taxi.

name: Blipbug
description: It's often found in gardens. The hairs on its body are actually sensory organs that gather information.

name: Dottler
description: As it grows inside its shell, it uses its psychic powers to keep track of what's happening outside.

name: Orbeetle
description: It’s famous for its high intelligence. It emits psychic energy to observe everything within a six-mile radius.

name: Nickit
description: Cunning and cautious, this Pokémon steals food from others and uses its tail to wipe away its footprints.

name: Thievul
description: It marks its prey with a scent and then follows them from a distance, waiting for an opportunity to steal their food.

name: Gossifleur
description: It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg and soaks up sunlight. When it's had enough, it blooms beautifully.

name: Eldegoss
description: The cotton on its head is filled with tiny seeds. These seeds are highly nutritious and beneficial to people and Pokémon.

name: Wooloo
description: Its curly fleece is such a good cushion that this Pokémon could survive falling off a cliff and stand right back up.

name: Dubwool
description: Its horns are as hard as iron. Its fleece is very popular as a material for high-quality carpets.

name: Chewtle
description: It bites anything that moves. It can't help itself—it's just a natural-born chomper.

name: Drednaw
description: With its powerful jaws, it can bite through iron bars. It's known for its aggressive nature and sharp temper.

name: Yamper
description: It tends to follow after anything that moves quickly. It generates electricity as it runs around.

name: Boltund
description: It sends electricity to its legs, allowing it to run at speeds exceeding 50 mph.

name: Rolycoly
description: It can race through dark caves like a unicycle on its wheel-like leg. It was once used to heat Galar homes.

name: Carkol
description: It forms coal inside its body. It can travel at high speeds by rolling its body like a wheel.

name: Coalossal
description: It’s usually peaceful, but if the coal mines are vandalized, it will incinerate the culprits with flames reaching 2,700 degrees.

name: Applin
description: It lives inside an apple. It protects itself from bird Pokémon by pretending to be an apple.

name: Flapple
description: It has eaten a tart apple and evolved. It can adjust the acidity of its bodily fluids to spit acid at its enemies.

name: Appletun
description: Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectar-like sweat covers its body, and its back is very sweet.

name: Silicobra
description: It spews sand from its nostrils. While the opponent is blinded, it hides in the ground.

name: Sandaconda
description: It squeezes itself through narrow gaps. When it finds a threat, it can blast out 220 pounds of sand from its nose.

name: Cramorant
description: It’s so strong that it can swallow an Arrokuda whole. It’s also very gluttonous.

name: Arrokuda
description: It swims in rivers with very fast currents. If it sees something moving, it will charge it immediately.

name: Barraskewda
description: It can swim at over 100 knots. It uses its sharp teeth to bite through its prey.

name: Toxel
description: It stores electricity in its body. When it's in danger, it releases the electricity from its organs.

name: Toxtricity
description: It has two forms, Amped and Low Key. It generates electricity by strumming the protrusions on its chest.

name: Sizzlipede
description: It wraps its prey in its heated body. It can reach temperatures of 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: Centiskorch
description: When it gets excited, its body temperature rises and its fire burns more intensely.

name: Clobbopus
description: It has a very curious nature. It will investigate anything that catches its eye with its tentacles.

name: Grapploct
description: A powerful wrestler, it uses its tentacles to grapple with its opponents and bring them to the ground.

name: Sinistea
description: It lives in a teacup and is said to be born from a lonely person’s tea.

name: Polteageist
description: It lives in a teapot and is very particular about the quality of its tea.

name: Hatenna
description: It can sense the emotions of people and Pokémon. It stays away from people with strong emotions.

name: Hattrem
description: If it senses strong emotions from someone, it will silence them by pummeling them with the braids on its head.

name: Hatterene
description: If you're too loud around it, you risk being torn apart by the claws on its tentacle.

name: Impidimp
description: It feeds on the negative energy of people and Pokémon. It often pulls pranks to get a reaction.

name: Morgrem
description: It lures people into the forest and then tricks them. It uses its sharp claws to defend itself.

name: Grimmsnarl
description: It has many hidden powers. It uses its hair to wrap around its enemies and crush them.

name: Obstagoon
description: It has a loud, intimidating roar. It uses its sharp claws to slash at its enemies.

name: Perrserker
description: What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.

name: Cursola
description: Be cautious of the ectoplasmic body surrounding its soul. You’ll become stiff as stone if you touch it.

name: Sirfetch'd
description: Only Farfetch'd that have survived many battles can attain this evolution. When its leek withers, it will retire from combat.

name: Mr. Rime
description: It’s highly skilled at tap-dancing. It waves its cane of ice while offering a sequence of polite bows.

name: Runerigus
description: A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing a Yamask, the painting began to move.

name: Milcery
description: This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream.

name: Alcremie
description: When Alcremie is happy, the cream it produces becomes sweeter and more delicious.

name: Falinks
description: Six of them get together to fight as one. The leader gives orders to the other five to coordinate their attacks.

name: Pincurchin
description: It stores electricity in its spines. Even if a spine breaks off, it can still discharge electricity for a while.

name: Snom
description: It eats snow that has settled on the ground. The more snow it eats, the larger and more impressive the spikes on its back grow.

name: Frosmoth
description: It shows no mercy to any who would dare desecrate the fields and mountains it calls home.

name: Stonjourner
description: It stands in grasslands, watching the sun’s descent. It’s capable of incredible kicks with its stone legs.

name: Eiscue
description: It keeps its head cold by covering it with an ice cube. It’s very sensitive to heat.

name: Indeedee
description: It lives to serve. It senses the needs of others and provides support before they even ask.

name: Morpeko
description: It carries roasted seeds around in its pockets. When it gets hungry, its temperament changes.

name: Cufant
description: It can carry over five tons. It helps with heavy labor and is very popular on construction sites.

name: Copperajah
description: They live in herds and are very protective of their young. Their skin is as hard as steel.

name: Dracozolt
description: In ancient times, it was unbeatable thanks to its powerful lower body to deliver electric kicks.

name: Arctozolt
description: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. It has a difficult time moving because its lower half is constantly shivering.

name: Dracovish
description: Its powerful legs allow it to run at speeds exceeding 40 mph, but it can only breathe underwater.

name: Arctovish
description: Though its face is on top of its head, this Pokémon is still able to eat prey by sucking them in.

name: Duraludon
description: Its body is made of a special metal that is both light and hard. It competes with Tyranitar for territory.

name: Dreepy
description: After being reborn as a ghost Pokémon, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit in ancient times.

name: Drakloak
description: It flies at speeds of over 120 mph. It carries a Dreepy on its head and takes care of it.

name: Dragapult
description: It keeps Dreepy in the holes of its horns and launches them like supersonic missiles.

name: Zacian
description: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal and can transform it into a weapon.

name: Zamazenta
description: This Pokémon was feared as a legendary hero. It can deflect any attack with its shield-like body.

name: Eternatus
description: It was inside a meteorite that fell 20,000 years ago. It absorbs energy from the land to stay active.

name: Kubfu
description: It trains its mind and body by working through various trials. It is very hardworking and serious.

name: Urshifu
description: It has two forms, Single Strike and Rapid Strike. It uses its powerful fists to deliver devastating blows.

name: Zarude
description: It lives in a pack deep in the heart of the jungle. It uses the vines on its wrists to swing from trees.

name: Regieleki
description: It is made of pure electrical energy. It is said that Regieleki can generate all the electricity used in Galar.

name: Regidrago
description: It is made of crystallized dragon energy. Regidrago is said to have the powers of all dragon Pokémon.

name: Glastrier
description: It has tremendous physical strength, and the mask of ice covering its face is 100 times harder than diamond.

name: Spectrier
description: It prefers silence and solitude. It is said that its kicks can separate a soul from its body.

name: Calyrex
description: Legend says this Pokémon ruled over Galar in ancient times. It is highly intelligent and can see the past, present, and future.

name: Wyrdeer
description: The black orbs on its antlers shine with an uncanny light when it uses psychic power to shield the herd.

name: Kleavor
description: Parts of its body have hardened into stone. It chips off pieces of its own stone body to sharpen its blades.

name: Ursaluna
description: I believe that the swampy terrain of Hisui gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat.

name: Basculegion
description: Clad in the souls of its comrades that perished during the journey upstream, it swims with incredible power.

name: Sneasler
description: Because of its infectious venom and physical power, it is nearly peerless among the cliffs of cold mountains.

name: Overqwil
description: Its spikes are as hard as steel. It is nicknamed the 'Sea Fiend' for its aggressive and prickly temperament.

name: Enamorus
description: When it flies to this land from across the sea, winter ends and spring begins. It is filled with love.

name: Sprigatito
description: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. It washes its face frequently to prevent it from drying out.

name: Floragato
description: It deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud at the end into its foes.

name: Meowscarada
description: With skillful misdirection, it rigs its foes with flower bombs and sets them off before they even notice.

name: Fuecoco
description: It lies on warm rocks and uses the heat absorbed by its square scales to create fire energy.

name: Crocalor
description: The fire energy inside this Pokémon's body has combined with its overflowing vitality to form an egg-shaped fireball.

name: Skeledirge
description: The fiery bird on its snout changes shape when Skeledirge sings, taking the form of a soul that attacks enemies.

name: Quaxly
description: This Pokémon migrated to Paldea from distant lands. The gel secreted by its feathers repels water and grime.

name: Quaxwell
description: These Pokémon constantly practice their legwork to ensure their kicks stay sharp and their movements graceful.

name: Quaquaval
description: A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. It dances through the air using its decorative water feathers.

name: Lechonk
description: It searches for food all day. It possesses a sharp sense of smell that allows it to find the most fragrant berries.

name: Oinkologne
description: It is a meticulous Pokémon that keeps itself clean. It emits a sweet, floral scent from its body.

name: Tarountula
description: The ball of thread wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther.

name: Spidops
description: It clings to branches and ceilings using its silk. It takes down its prey with its sticky, silent movements.

name: Pawmi
description: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. It rubs its forepaws against its cheeks to generate electricity.

name: Pawmo
description: When its group is attacked, it strikes first with its forepaws. It uses a unique fighting style to discharge sparks.

name: Pawmot
description: This Pokémon is usually slow-moving, but in battle it attacks with lightning-fast strikes of its paws.

name: Tandemaus
description: The pair exhibits great teamwork. They use their sharp incisors to cut through any obstacle in their path.

name: Maushold
description: The little ones just appeared one day. They all live together like a family, though the relationship is unknown.

name: Fidough
description: This Pokémon has a smooth, moist skin. It breathes out yeast from the corners of its mouth to ferment things.

name: Dachsbun
description: The surface of its body is hardened by the heat of the sun. It gives off a pleasant, toasted-bread aroma.

name: Smoliv
description: It shoots oil out from the fruit on its head to slow down its enemies so that it can flee.

name: Dolliv
description: It shares its tasty, high-quality oil with others. It lives in sunny areas and spends its days basking.

name: Arboliva
description: This kindhearted Pokémon will share its nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon to help them recover.

name: Squawkabilly
description: These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form noisy flocks and fight over territory.

name: Nacli
description: It was born in a layer of rock salt deep underground. It shares its precious salt with those who are lacking.

name: Naclstack
description: It dry-cures its prey by spraying it with salt. The salt it produces is highly valued for food preservation.

name: Garganacl
description: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together to sprinkle salt over injured Pokémon to heal their wounds.

name: Charcadet
description: Its body is like a piece of charcoal. When it gets excited, its fire burns more intensely.

name: Armarouge
description: Armarouge believes in a fair fight and will challenge any opponent to a duel to prove its strength.

name: Ceruledge
description: The blades on its arms are made of spectral energy. It will do anything to win a battle.

name: Tadbulb
description: It floats using its internal gas. It generates electricity by shaking its tail.

name: Bellibolt
description: It expands and contracts its body to generate electricity in its belly-button dynamo.

name: Wattrel
description: When its wings catch the wind, it generates electricity. It dives into the sea to catch its prey.

name: Kilowattrel
description: It uses its throat sac to store electricity. It can fly for long distances by using the wind.

name: Maschiff
description: It has a very protective nature. It will bark at anyone who gets too close to its Trainer.

name: Mabosstiff
description: This Pokémon is usually very gentle, but it will become extremely aggressive if its pack is threatened.

name: Shroodle
description: It uses its sharp teeth to bite through obstacles. It is very small and can easily hide.

name: Grafaiai
description: It paints patterns on trees using its poisonous saliva to mark its territory and lure prey.

name: Bramblin
description: It was born when a tumbleweed absorbed a lost soul. It rolls across the desert, searching for something.

name: Brambleghast
description: It can open its body to trap its prey. It is very fast and can easily catch anything that moves.

name: Toedscool
description: Though it looks like Tentacool, it is a completely different species that lives in forests.

name: Toedscruel
description: It lives in groups deep in the forest. It uses its tentacles to catch prey and defend itself.

name: Klawf
description: It hangs upside down from cliffs to ambush its prey. It is very strong and can easily crush boulders.

name: Capsakid
description: The more sunlight it absorbs, the spicier the chemical inside its body becomes.

name: Scovillain
description: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy, while the green head uses them for physical attacks.

name: Rellor
description: It rolls a ball of mud and sand. It is very hardworking and will not stop until its ball is perfect.

name: Rabsca
description: The orb it rolls contains an infant soul. It uses its psychic power to protect the orb from any threat.

name: Flittle
description: It levitates using psychic power. It is very small and can easily be blown away by the wind.

name: Espathra
description: It has a very elegant appearance. It uses its psychic power to control its movements and attack its enemies.

name: Tinkatink
description: It swings its handmade hammer to protect itself. It is always looking for better metal to improve its hammer.

name: Tinkatuff
description: This Pokémon lives in scrap heaps. It uses its hammer to smash anything that gets in its way.

name: Tinkaton
description: It has a very mischievous nature. It uses its massive hammer to knock Corviknight out of the sky.

name: Wiglett
description: Though it looks like Diglett, it is a completely different species that lives on the beach.

name: Wugtrio
description: It lives in groups on the beach. It uses its three heads to search for prey and defend its territory.

name: Bombirdier
description: It drops objects from the sky to attack its prey. It is very accurate and can hit a target from far away.

name: Finizen
description: It loves to play with people and Pokémon. It is very friendly and can be found in the sea.

name: Palafin
description: It has two forms, Zero and Hero. In its Hero Form, it possesses incredible strength and can swim at high speeds.

name: Varoom
description: It was born when a poison Pokémon combined with a discarded engine. It feeds on minerals in rocks.

name: Revavroom
description: It can move at high speeds by firing off its cylinders. It is very aggressive and will attack anything that moves.

name: Cyclizar
description: People have been riding Cyclizar since ancient times. It can run at over 70 mph while carrying a person.

name: Orthworm
description: It lives in the desert and feeds on iron. When it's in danger, it can curl up into a ball to protect itself.

name: Glimmet
description: It clings to cave walls and absorbs minerals from the rock. It glows with a strange light.

name: Glimmora
description: It can fire off its petals to attack its enemies. The petals are poisonous and can cause paralysis on contact.

name: Greavard
description: It lives in the ground and will jump out to surprise people. It is very friendly and loves to play.

name: Houndstone
description: It is said to be the reincarnation of a dog Pokémon that died while waiting for its Trainer.

name: Flamigo
description: It lives in groups and will attack as one. It is very strong and can easily kick its enemies to the ground.

name: Cetoddle
description: It lives in cold regions and is very playful. It has a thick layer of fat to protect it from the cold.

name: Cetitan
description: It has immense physical strength and can easily crush boulders with its body. It is very territorial.

name: Veluza
description: It can shed its own flesh to boost its speed. It is very fast and can easily catch its prey.

name: Dondozo
description: It has a very large body and is very strong. It lives in lakes and will protect its territory from any threat.

name: Tatsugiri
description: It is a very small Pokémon that lives in lakes. It is very intelligent and can trick its enemies.

name: Annihilape
description: When Primeape's rage finally reached its peak, it gained a power that allows its spirit to leave its body.

name: Clodsire
description: It lives in swamps and is very friendly. It has a thick layer of skin to protect it from the environment.

name: Farigiraf
description: The two brains are now connected via thick nerves, increasing its psychic power significantly.

name: Dudunsparce
description: It has two forms, Two-Segment and Three-Segment. It is very friendly and loves to play in the ground.

name: Kingambit
description: It leads a massive army of Bisharp and Pawniard. It is very strong and will not stop until it wins.

name: Brute Bonnet
description: This Pokémon is said to be an ancestor of Amoonguss. It is very territorial and will protect its area.

name: Scream Tail
description: This Pokémon is said to be an ancestor of Jigglypuff. It has a very loud, intimidating roar.

name: Great Tusk
description: This Pokémon is said to be an ancestor of Donphan. it is very aggressive and will attack anything.

name: Flutter Mane
description: This Pokémon is said to be an ancestor of Misdreavus. It has a very elegant appearance and is very fast.

name: Slither Wing
description: This Pokémon is said to be an ancestor of Volcarona. It has a very powerful lower body for attacks.

name: Sandy Shocks
description: This Pokémon is said to be an ancestor of Magneton. It generates electricity by shaking its body.

name: Iron Treads
description: This Pokémon is said to be a future descendant of Donphan. It has a very hard, metal body.

name: Iron Bundle
description: This Pokémon is said to be a future descendant of Delibird. It is very fast and can easily catch prey.

name: Iron Hands
description: This Pokémon is said to be a future descendant of Hariyama. It has immense physical strength.

name: Iron Jugulis
description: This Pokémon is said to be a future descendant of Hydreigon. It has a very aggressive nature.

name: Iron Moth
description: This Pokémon is said to be a future descendant of Volcarona. It generates fire energy from its wings.

name: Iron Thorns
description: This Pokémon is said to be a future descendant of Tyranitar. It has a very hard, metal body.

name: Frigibax
description: It lives in cold regions and is very playful. It has a thick layer of fat to protect it from the cold.

name: Arctibax
description: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. It has a difficult time moving because its lower half is shivering.

name: Baxcalibur
description: It has immense physical strength and can easily crush boulders with its body. It is very territorial.

name: Gimmighoul
description: It has two forms, Chest and Roaming. It collects coins to increase its power.

name: Gholdengo
description: It is said to be the reincarnation of a person who died while waiting for a coin.
